raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I placed an online order with Home Depot using my Home Depot store credit card ( Order # XXXX ), totaling {$1200.00}. The order included several XXXX power tools and accessories. According to the Home Depot app, the items were marked as Delivered on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, to my address at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, CA XXXX. 

However, I never received any of the packages. I was not home during the time of delivery, and I did not authorize the packages to be left unattended or without a signature. There were no doorbell notifications, no delivery confirmation photos, and no packages when I returned home. 

I contacted Home Depot customer service but received no resolution. I then filed a billing dispute with Citi, the issuer of the Home Depot credit card. Citi later denied my dispute, stating that the merchant did not respond. 

I have submitted all relevant documents and screenshots showing the delivery status and order details through the Home Depot app, and I have made multiple attempts to resolve this in good faith. 

I am requesting a full refund of {$1200.00} because I never received the merchandise, and I have taken reasonable steps to resolve this matter with both Home Depot and the credit card company.
